pin.title: Pairing PIN
pin.description: Enter the 3-digit pairing PIN for {address} (shown on the fridge display during pairing).

range.title: Setpoint range
range.description: Set the minimum and maximum temperature your fridge supports. Defaults are confirmed for the single-zone myCOOLMAN 43; adjust if yours differs.

error.invalid_pin: The PIN must be exactly 3 hex digits (e.g. 822).
error.min_max_invalid: Maximum temperature must be greater than the minimum.

abort.no_devices_found: No myCOOLMAN fridge was found. Make sure it is powered on and in range of a Bluetooth adapter or proxy.

init.title: Setpoint range
init.description: Set the minimum and maximum temperature your fridge supports.

error.min_max_invalid: Maximum temperature must be greater than the minimum.
